compounds.frequency: every 6 days (alternating with Tirz every 3 days)
every 6 days (alternating with Reta every 3 days)

benefits.description: Lost 41 lbs in 4 months on the stack

side_effects.description: Wicked cotton mouth on both compounds

protocol_notes: Stacking Reta and Tirz until Tirz runs out, then switching to Reta only. Alternating schedule: 2mg Reta, then 3 days later 5mg Tirz, then 3 days later 2mg Reta, and so on. Note: doses reported as 'ml' by user but likely mg given context of GLP-1/GIP agonist dosing — recorded as mg. Describes experience as 'so far so good'.
